attack_vectors.subject: URGENT: Acme Corp Security Compliance Review - Immediate Action Required
attack_vectors.body_preview: Dear John Doe, as part of the Q3 security audit for Acme Corp, your credentials require immediate verification...

attack_vectors.message: Hi John Doe, this is Acme Corp IT. We detected anomalous activity on your account. Please confirm your identity here: [LINK]

attack_vectors.body_preview: Attention John Doe, attached is the finalized invoice for recent vendor services. Please review the attached PDF...
